channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Drove during green light, 8th April
item.description:
A student walked across the road, as the student was doing so a Royal Mail vehicle attempted to drive while he was walking, endangering the student
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 46-50, Lupus Street, Pimlico, City of Westminster
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: SORN car parked in a public road hasn't moved in weeks, 8th April
item.description:
GREY AUDI YF09 UKJ vehicleenquiry.service.gov.uk shows SORN declaration parked in a public road hasn't moved in weeks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cambray Road, Crofton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped duvet / bedding, 8th April
item.description:
Dumped bedding

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Wetherell Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pile of rubbish at the junction of Bannackburn and Brookdene Road in Plumstead, 8th April
item.description:
Pile of rubbish at the junction of Bannackburn and Brookdene Road in Plumstead

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brookdene Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mice living under the tree, 8th April
item.description:
Pest patrol have been out but the mice have come back

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Freshfield Avenue, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Repeated flytipping on corner of Sherwood Gardens on pavement by tree, 8th April
item.description:
Repeated flytipping of what looks to be heavy items being cleared for building or house clearance. They appear to be doing this at night so it may be worth putting up a concealed, battery-powered camera to get footage for potential prosecution. We all appreciate the difficult job you do in dealing with this. Thank you on behalf of myself and all my neighbours.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sherwood Gardens, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping and piling rubbing at the junction of Brewery Road and Piedmont Road in Plumstead, 8th April
item.description:
Flytipping and piling rubbing at the junction of Brewery Road and Piedmont Road in Plumstead

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brewery Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mixture of rubbish left behind., 8th April
item.description:
Large rubbish left with the bins like old doors, boxes etc left behind.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mundania Road, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bed frame on Colthurst crescent, 8th April
item.description:
On Colthrust crescent there is an old bed frame belonging to elderly resident.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Colthurst Crescent, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Vehicle left which looks stolen. Hidden behind a food truck and blocking entrance. Cannot locate owner and has never parked within this area before., 8th April
item.description:
Vehicle looks abandoned and left blocking entrance to a food truck.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mickleham Close, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 8th April
item.description:
Stuff left outside of Barnardos outside of shop opening hours
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kentlea Road, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Stench of rotting meat, 8th April
item.description:
This bin is emitting foul and vomit inducing smell of rotting meat. Can someone please empty it.? It is surely a health hazard

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Chatsworth Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing estate bins, 8th April
item.description:
All the bins on this estate are overflowing. It looks like this housing association has inadequate bins and no recycling.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Mulberry Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street lighting faulty, 8th April
item.description:
The road lighting at the back of the gardens of Lemmon road is on all day and off all night for at least a few weeks.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lemmon Road, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lots of Street weeds growing on pathways, 8th April
item.description:
This is the pedestrian alley between Bromley Road and The Mead. Lots of overgrown street weeds and new ones growing on the sides. It has been there for months and have also seen dog poo bags left behind the overgrown weeds.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 49, Bromley Road, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Filthy steeets, 8th April
item.description:
Our road and street is full to the brink with dirty and rubbish . Our pavement has not been swept in over six years

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gilbert Road, Lower Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Near number 57 Highgate West Hill on ponds square, 8th April
item.description:
Overgrown weeds growing out of cracks on the pavement

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pond Square, Highgate, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street litter, 8th April
item.description:
Goes all the way up the road on both sides.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Thanet Road, North End, Greater London

item.title: Fridge freezer has been dumped, 8th April
item.description:
Been here for a week. Nearest address is 30 Brabourn Grove SE15 2BS.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brabourn Grove, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Near No 8 Ponds Square, 8th April
item.description:
This has caused flooding and has been reported multiple times and blocked for over a year.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pond Square, Highgate, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
